name: Tomato Bruschetta
description: Toasted baguette topped with diced tomatoes, basil, garlic, and olive oil.

name: Caesar Salad
description: Romaine, parmesan, croutons, anchovy caesar dressing.

name: Classic Burger
description: 8oz beef patty with lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles on a brioche bun.
notes: Comes with fries. Sub salad +$2. Add cheese +$1, bacon +$2.

name: Pan-Seared Salmon
description: Atlantic salmon, lemon-butter sauce, seasonal vegetables, wild rice.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: San Marzano tomato, fresh mozzarella, basil, olive oil on wood-fired crust.

name: Tiramisu
description: Espresso-soaked ladyfingers layered with mascarpone cream, dusted with cocoa.

name: House Red
description: Glass of our rotating house red wine, currently a Tuscan Sangiovese.

name: Fresh Lemonade
description: House-made lemonade with fresh-squeezed lemon and mint.
